speaking_style: Measured and deliberate. Uses merchant's jargon occasionally. Rarely commits to anything.
backstory_seeds: recently arrived from a long journey through difficult roads
carrying goods they'd rather not discuss in detail
looking for information about local trade conditions or road safety
waiting for a business contact who may or may not show up
made a significant profit this season and is being careful not to look like it
runs a route between towns and has noticed something unusual at one of the stops that he can not explain
considering whether to expand into a new type of goods that would be more profitable but considerably more risk
had a cart and a horse stolen three months ago and has been slowly rebuilding since
